name: Dakota
description:
The Eagle. Free as the wind. Well, free as long as her Chieftess mother permits it.

The anthro Bald Eagle daughter of the matriarchal native K'ámamul tribe's Chieftess! She is supposed to inherit that role; if only she could stop thinking thinking about the outside world! She particularly can't stop thinking about the strange, bipedal, hairless apes that recently settled on the continent....
creator: Gonkman
